summary: Testing Bug Fixes (Iteration 10) - BOTH BUGS VERIFIED FIXED. 1) Admin View button now navigates to /admin/tickets/:ticketId showing full ticket detail with journey timeline. 2) Direct hardware tickets (without supervisor) now appear in Accountant Hardware Queue with 'REVERSE PICKUP (DIRECT)' badge.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (ticket MG-R-20260314-91234)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes confirmed working. Admin ticket detail page shows full ticket journey with timeline. Accountant Hardware Queue now includes direct hardware tickets with 'REVERSE PICKUP (DIRECT)' badge and Upload Pickup Label button.

bug_fix_1_admin_ticket_view.details: Admin ticket View button now navigates to /admin/tickets/:ticketId (e.g., /admin/tickets/6ab37159-0c0c-47ab-a538-cbac99353809). Previously was redirecting to home page.

admin_ticket_detail_page.details: New AdminTicketDetail.jsx page shows: Current Status section, Customer Information, Product Details, Issue Description, Ticket Journey Timeline with timestamps, Agent Notes (support/escalation/supervisor)

admin_ticket_detail_back_button.details: Back to All Tickets button navigates back to /admin/tickets

bug_fix_2_accountant_direct_hardware.details: Direct hardware tickets (support_type='hardware' without supervisor_action) now appear in Accountant Hardware Queue. Test ticket MG-R-20260314-91234 confirmed visible.

accountant_reverse_pickup_direct_badge.details: 'REVERSE PICKUP (DIRECT)' badge displayed for direct hardware tickets that bypassed supervisor

accountant_upload_pickup_label_button.details: Upload Pickup Label button available for direct hardware tickets in accountant queue

accountant_hardware_queue_count.details: Hardware Queue shows 72 tickets, correctly filtering both direct and supervisor-routed tickets
